text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
The photo in the envelope shows what appears to be the room Ms.
Beauty was in when she explained the rules of the audition to us this
morning.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? How come...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Rice, did you notice something?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Um... This might be totally unrelated to the riddle, but the
grandfather clock in this room... is missing its hands.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: It's strange... the clock in the photo clearly has its hands installed.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
...!
You're right, nice job catching that!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, not to mention... I've seen these clock hands somewhere
before... Ah!

text_block_list.name: Rice and Urara
text_block_list.text: Urara, is it this?! Rice, is it this?!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
...!
So those were the hands of a grandfather clock! Which means, we
need to set the hands at "the right place, at the right time!"

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Let's give it a go!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Nothing's... happening.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Whaaa, but why?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I-I guess it really was just me misunderstanding the riddle...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
What do we do? Because of my mistake, we're almost out of time...
I'm so sorry.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Everything'll be okay, Rice. At times like this, it's important to stay
cool.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. There is no mistaking that these are the hands of a
grandfather clock. Hence, we either installed the hands improperly,
or in the wrong order. Unless...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
This isn't the correct grandfather clock, perhaps? Ah, yes, that must
be the reason.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Aha! I think I get it now! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Fine, wanna try saying the answer together? The answer to the final
riddle is...

text_block_list.name: Fine and Curren
text_block_list.text: Not here! It's in another room!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: H-huh? What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I noticed this room was a little different from the one Ms.
Beauty explained the rules from this morning. Wanna know her trick?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Live streaming! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
It's not a hard rule, but most people use their front camera when
streaming from their phone, right?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: And when you use your front camera, the video gets mirrored.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: In other words, the left and right sides of the image get flipped!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
What I'm thinking, is that there's probably another room in this hotel
that looks just like this photo, but reversed!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Interesting, so that was your thought process, Curren. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
As for myself, I recalled our conversation with the hotel staff member
who guided us to this room.

text_block_list.name: Polite Staff
text_block_list.text: Now then, first... please enter the room. Whenever you're ready.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
That staff member must've been well trained. He guided us
efficiently, without saying a word too little nor too much.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
And that is what made it all the more strange. I couldn't help but
notice how he stressed the word "first" to us.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ms. Beauty surely gave him lines to repeat to us. And in that line, he
chose to place emphasis on the word "first." So if this room is first...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Then what comes after?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Once I thought about that, the rest was simple. After all, in the hotel's
guide map, there was only one other room that matched the size of
our current room.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Now that's some Fine work! I didn't notice any of that.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I'm equally impressed by both of you. But for now, we should
hurry—time's running short.

text_block_list.name: Polite Staff
text_block_list.text: This way, if you will. Allow me to guide you to the next room.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Whoa! The room's flipped, just like you said!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Urara, let's put in these clock hands!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
You two, don't forget that since the clock in the photo is flipped, you
have to flip the position of the clock hands as well!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I found something! It was inside the clock... This has to be the chapel
key, right?

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Très bieeeen! You five have beautifully solved all of my riddles!

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: All that's left is for you to propose! I'll be waiting in the chapel!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yay, we did it! C'mon, let's go!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
There's no need to rush, you two. It's not a race to the chapel, you
know.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hehe, a cute conclusion to the audition! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
"Cute," you say... You're right. It was a wonderful set of riddles, and
everyone enthusiastically gave it their all.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Now, it's Ms. Beauty's turn. I wonder how she'll show off our cuteness
through the racewear? I can't wait! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: It's Ms. Beauty's turn now?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yup! ♪ I mean, we already showed her our ideal selves. As for what
those look like...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Isn't it Ms. Beauty's job to design dresses that embody our ideals?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
At least, she better. The whole reason I entered this audition was so I
could wear cute new racewear and become even cuter.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: A dress that brings us closer to our ideals...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I see now... I finally understand why everyone wishes to wear Ms.
Beauty's racewear.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: It's simple, really... After all, do I not feel the same way?
